latest_news.headline: IRGC claims strikes on Kuwait and UAE air bases - ballistic missiles + suicide drones
latest_news.text: IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri claims 'pounded' Al-Minhad (UAE) and Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait) air bases with massive ballistic missile + suicide drone barrage. Says bases were 'origin of aggression' against Iran. UAE air defenses actively responding.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defenses responding to active missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE National Emergency Crisis and Disaster Management Authority confirms air defenses responding to missile threat. Tells residents to remain in safe locations. Direct threat to UAE territory escalates.

latest_news.headline: Putin tells Iran Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner'
latest_news.text: Putin's Nowruz message to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal.

latest_news.headline: UK Foreign Secretary: Iran strikes on Gulf 'reckless' - wants 'swift resolution'
latest_news.text: UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper calls Iran's Gulf strikes 'reckless', says UK wants 'swift resolution' and regional stability. Reiterates UK will offer defensive support but 'will not be drawn into wider conflict.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: Strait of Hormuz must be protected 'by other nations who use it'
latest_news.text: Trump says Hormuz protection should fall on 'other nations who use it' - further evidence of US disengagement from coalition-building for Hormuz. Pushes burden to Asian/European importers.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 73% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 16 - IMMINENT. Hezbollah rockets at Nahariya. IDF strikes Beirut suburbs (7 neighborhoods). 12 medical workers killed in health center strike. Litani push continues. Updated 2026-03-21T16:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. NATO intercepts ongoing. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 34% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24. TTP 3-day truce holding. Post-Eid resumption feared. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

new: Trump: 'winding down' Iran operations - Truth Social post
CENTCOM degrades Hormuz threat - underground cruise missile facility destroyed
22 nations commit to Hormuz safe passage coalition
Drone kills officer at Baghdad intelligence HQ
4 Hezbollah killed overnight in S. Lebanon (combined arms)
UK arrests 2 (incl. 1 Iranian) at Trident nuclear submarine base
Israel claims 'significantly degraded' Tehran ballistic missile production

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 15. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' + 'close to objectives'. CENTCOM degrades Hormuz. 22-nation coalition forming for safe passage. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. ESCALATION: Israel Katz says strikes 'will intensify'. Tehran ballistic production 'degraded' (implies continued strikes). Baghdad intel drone strike. Diego Garcia missile fire. 4 Hezbollah killed overnight. UK Trident base breach attempt. NET: US pulling back rhetorically while Israel doubles down. Contradiction between Trump 'winding down' and Katz 'intensify' is the defining tension of Day 22.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 5th missile barrage at Israel since midnight - Dimona sirens
latest_news.text: Iran launches 5th missile attack on Israel since midnight. Sirens in Dimona, likely intercepted. Hezbollah simultaneously fires rockets at Nahariya from Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Cluster munition damages kindergarten in Rishon Lezion, central Israel
latest_news.text: Iranian cluster missile damages kindergarten in Rishon Lezion. Shrapnel seriously damages building. Home Front Command rescue ops at multiple central Israel impact sites. Major geographic expansion of Iranian strikes to central Israel civilian areas.

latest_news.headline: IDF wide-scale strikes hit dozens of Tehran IRGC targets
latest_news.text: IDF says IAF struck dozens of targets in Tehran overnight: IRGC ballistic missile component production, rocket fuel ministry complex, missile parts manufacturing, and Iranian defense systems across capital.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,398 including 210 children - 640 strikes Friday alone
latest_news.text: Hrana confirms 1,398 killed since war began (210 children). 640 strikes across 17 Iranian provinces on Friday alone caused 68 casualties. 1,165 military + 657 unclassified fatalities.

latest_news.headline: NATO withdraws all troops from Iraq advisory mission
latest_news.text: NATO confirms withdrawal of all troops from Iraq advisory mission. Major reduction of Western military presence in Iraq as Iran-backed militia attacks continue.

latest_news.headline: Iran allows Japanese ships to transit Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iran announces it will allow Japanese ships through Hormuz. Japan sources 90% of crude from Middle East. Selective easing of blockade continues - bilateral deals with individual nations.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 15:04 UTC) - CONTRADICTION AT CORE: Trump 'winding down' vs Israel 'intensify'. CENTCOM degrades Hormuz — 22 nations pledge safe passage coalition. Baghdad intel HQ drone-killed. 4 Hezbollah dead in overnight ground ops. Natanz no radiation confirmed. Russia refuses peace talks. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Eid (Mar 24). Diego Garcia missiles 'unsuccessful'. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 16. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric, CENTCOM degrades Hormuz, 22-nation safe passage coalition, Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz, IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. ESCALATION: 5th Iranian missile barrage since midnight, cluster munition kindergarten central Israel, 640 strikes Friday (1,398 dead incl 210 children), IDF wide-scale Tehran strikes, NATO withdraws from Iraq, Khamenei 'enemy defeated', Hezbollah rockets Nahariya. NET: Intensity undiminished despite 'winding down' rhetoric. Civilian toll mounting. Iran still launching barrages, Israel still striking Tehran.
